title: Outlook Email — split workspace + portrait/landscape reading
description:
Further polished the PipeSync Outlook Email page into a cleaner split workspace (list pane + reading pane). Folder tabs and header buttons are slimmer with no pill glow. Unread messages use a dot indicator instead of loud badges.

The reading pane now auto-detects email layout: narrow portrait newsletters are centered in a readable column; wide landscape tables (e.g. security digests) expand with horizontal scroll. A short hint appears when sideways scroll or centering applies. Preview header uses grouped actions on desktop.

Presentation only — no email API changes. Cache bust hl57.

Who is affected: PipeSync users on pipeshare.live who use Outlook Email.
changeLog: Email: unified split workspace with full-height list and reading panes.
Email: auto portrait/landscape layout for HTML message bodies.
Email: unread dot indicators; slimmer tabs and action toolbar.
Email: wide-table horizontal scroll with layout hint.
Production Ready V1: refined email grid and canvas polish.
